mapper.sql: id, device_uuid, username, nickname, password, mobile, token, token_expire_time, vip, vip_expire_time, role, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE mobile = #{mobile} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE device_uuid = #{deviceUuid} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE token = #{token} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE mobile = #{mobile}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE vip = 'vip'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (device_uuid, username, nickname, password, mobile, token, token_expire_time, vip, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{deviceUuid}, #{username}, #{nickname}, #{password}, #{mobile}, #{token}, #{tokenExpireTime}, #{vip}, #{role}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = CASE WHEN username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) <> '' THEN username ELSE CONCAT('用户', CAST(id AS CHAR)) END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE nickname IS NULL OR TRIM(nickname) = ''
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
